title: Lead Instructional Designer at Sri Chaitanya

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Sri Chaitanya
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Instructional Designer in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!
